title: IvToolkit TF-E
body:
IvToolkit TF-E
=========

Personal toolkit for Minecraft modding.
Feel free to use both the source (as per license) and the mod.

Required by Recurrent Complex

Had to add this to modrinth due to recurrent complex tf-e has it as dependency.

Only difference that should exist is that its been compiled in newer gradle.

There might be difference due to that i had to get it from commit history due to no tags.

# License stuff

[LICENSE](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Thorfusion/IvToolkit/1.7/LICENSE.md)
